mapper.select: SELECT P.PRODUCT_ID, P.PRODUCT_NAME, P.PRODUCT_TYPE, F.FILE_PATH, F.FILE_NAME FROM PRODUCT P JOIN ATTACH_FILE_MANAGE F ON P.ATTACH_FILE_ID = F.ATTACH_FILE_ID WHERE P.PRODUCT_TYPE = #{productType} ORDER BY P.INSERT_DT DESC LIMIT 6

SELECT A.PRODUCT_ID, A.PRODUCT_NAME, A.PRODUCT_TYPE, A.PRODUCT_DESC, B.FILE_PATH, B.FILE_NAME, GROUP_CONCAT(C.PRICE ORDER BY C.PRICE SEPARATOR ',') AS prices FROM PRODUCT A INNER JOIN ATTACH_FILE_MANAGE B ON A.ATTACH_FILE_ID = B.ATTACH_FILE_ID INNER JOIN PRODUCT_PRICE C ON A.PRODUCT_ID = C.PRODUCT_ID WHERE A.PRODUCT_TYPE = #{productType}
AND A.PRODUCT_NAME LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchText}, '%')
GROUP BY A.PRODUCT_ID,A.PRODUCT_NAME,A.PRODUCT_TYPE,B.FILE_PATH,B.FILE_NAME ORDER BY A.INSERT_DT DESC
LIMIT #{offset} , 12

SELECT A.PRODUCT_ID, A.PRODUCT_NAME, A.PRODUCT_TYPE, A.PRODUCT_DESC, B.FILE_PATH, B.FILE_NAME, GROUP_CONCAT(C.PRICE ORDER BY C.PRICE SEPARATOR ',') AS prices FROM PRODUCT A INNER JOIN ATTACH_FILE_MANAGE B ON A.ATTACH_FILE_ID = B.ATTACH_FILE_ID INNER JOIN PRODUCT_PRICE C ON A.PRODUCT_ID = C.PRODUCT_ID GROUP BY A.PRODUCT_ID,A.PRODUCT_NAME,A.PRODUCT_TYPE,B.FILE_PATH,B.FILE_NAME ORDER BY A.INSERT_DT DESC LIMIT 4

SELECT A.BGM_ID, A.BGM_NAME, A.ARTIST, A.LYRICS, B.FILE_PATH, C.PRICE FROM BGM A INNER JOIN ATTACH_FILE_MANAGE B ON A.IMAGE_FILE_ATTACH_ID = B.ATTACH_FILE_ID INNER JOIN BGM_PRICE C ON A.BGM_ID = C.BGM_ID
WHERE A.BGM_NAME LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchText}, '%')
ORDER BY A.BGM_ID DESC
LIMIT #{offset} , 12

SELECT A.PRODUCT_ID, A.PRODUCT_NAME, A.PRODUCT_TYPE, A.PRODUCT_DESC, B.FILE_PATH, B.FILE_NAME, GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT C.PRICE ORDER BY C.PRICE SEPARATOR ',') AS prices FROM PRODUCT A INNER JOIN ATTACH_FILE_MANAGE B ON A.ATTACH_FILE_ID = B.ATTACH_FILE_ID INNER JOIN PRODUCT_PRICE C ON A.PRODUCT_ID = C.PRODUCT_ID LEFT JOIN USER_ITEM_INVENTORY D ON A.PRODUCT_ID = D.ITEM_ID WHERE D.ITEM_TYPE = 'P' GROUP BY A.PRODUCT_ID, A.PRODUCT_NAME, A.PRODUCT_TYPE, B.FILE_PATH, B.FILE_NAME ORDER BY COUNT(D.ITEM_ID) DESC, A.INSERT_DT DESC LIMIT 4

SELECT B.BGM_ID, B.BGM_NAME, B.ARTIST, B.LYRICS, C.FILE_PATH, D.PRICE FROM USER_ITEM_INVENTORY A INNER JOIN BGM B ON A.ITEM_ID = B.BGM_ID INNER JOIN ATTACH_FILE_MANAGE C ON B.IMAGE_FILE_ATTACH_ID = C.ATTACH_FILE_ID INNER JOIN BGM_PRICE D ON B.BGM_ID = D.BGM_ID WHERE A.ITEM_TYPE = 'M' GROUP BY B.BGM_ID,B.BGM_NAME,B.ARTIST,C.FILE_PATH ORDER BY COUNT(A.ITEM_ID) DESC LIMIT 4

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM PRODUCT WHERE PRODUCT_TYPE = #{productType}
AND PRODUCT_NAME LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchText}, '%')

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM BGM
WHERE BGM_NAME LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchText}, '%')
